---
title: "Timu"
editor:
  markdown:
    wrap: 72
---

Mradi wa DAWA unaunganisha watafiti na wataalam wa afya ya umma kutoka
Uswisi na Tanzania. Maelezo ya wanachama wa timu yataongezwa hapa.

---

## Mtafiti Mkuu

::: {.team-card}
**[Jina]**
*[Cheo]*
Kituo cha Afya ya Msingi na Afya ya Umma (Unisanté), Chuo Kikuu cha
Lausanne, Uswisi
:::

---

## Watafiti Wenza na Washirika

::: {.team-card}
**[Jina]**
*[Cheo]*
[Taasisi]
:::

::: {.team-card}
**[Jina]**
*[Cheo]*
Taasisi ya Afya ya Ifakara (IHI), Tanzania
:::

::: {.team-card}
**[Jina]**
*[Cheo]*
Wizara ya Afya ya Zanzibar, Tanzania
:::

---

## Taasisi

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="33%"}
**Kituo cha Afya ya Msingi na Afya ya Umma (Unisanté)**
Chuo Kikuu cha Lausanne
Barabara ya Bugnon 44, 1011 Lausanne
Uswisi
*Mdhamini na kituo cha uratibu*
:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
**Taasisi ya Afya ya Ifakara (IHI)**
S.L.P. 78373
Dar es Salaam, Tanzania
*Mshirika wa utekelezaji*
:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
**Wizara ya Afya ya Zanzibar**
Zanzibar, Tanzania
*Mshirika wa serikali*
:::

::::

<style>
.team-card {
  border: 1px solid #d0e8d8;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 1rem 1.2rem;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  background-color: #f6fbf8;
}
</style>
